sources.notes: First-party v2 expansion maintained inside the LocalPinyinIME project. Entries focus on daily sentence input, reusable phrase components, time/weather, questions, requests, study, work, technology, shopping, food, and transport. No third-party lexicon, scraped corpus, public GitHub dictionary, or commercial IME data was imported. Frequency values are project-maintained relative weights, not internet frequency, search frequency, commercial IME frequency, or corpus statistics.
